titleStmt.title: SII 5.481: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 481. (A.R. No. 187 of 1894). ON THE SAME WALL.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti ≈õrƒ´ . ko·πüca·π≠aipa·πâmarƒÅ·πâa tribhuvanaccakkaravattika·∏∑ Emma·πá·π≠alamum ko·πá·π≠aru·∏∑iya cuntarapƒÅ·πá·π≠iyateva·πükku yƒÅ·πá·π≠u 9 vatu vaikƒÅci mƒÅtam Ira·πá·π≠ƒÅn tiyati nƒÅ·∏∑ tirukka·∏ªukku·πâ·πüattu U·π≠aiyƒÅr po·πâi·π≠·π≠ƒ´curamu·π≠aiyanƒÅya·πâƒÅr koyilukku ƒÄtica·πá·π≠ecuratevarka·πâmamika·∏∑om Iv≈´r U·π≠aiyƒÅr tirukka·∏ªukku·πâ·πüamu·π≠aiya nƒÅya·πâƒÅr koyilil p≈´cikkum civaruttirapa·πá·π≠itarum civamuttipa·π≠·π≠arum taru·πáentucekarapa·π≠·π≠arum tirukka·∏ªukku·πâ·πüamu·π≠aiyƒÅ·πâ pa·π≠·π≠arum civaj√±ƒÅ
·πâapa·πá·π≠uitarum cantirap≈´·π£a·πáapa·π≠·π≠arum Ivva·πâaivarom Upaiyatti·π≠·π≠uk ku·π≠utta paricƒÅvatu U·π≠aiyƒÅr po·πâi·π≠·π≠ƒ´curamu·π≠aiyanƒÅya·πâƒÅraip p≈´cikkap p≈´caipe·πü·πüukku nƒÅ·πÖka·∏∑ po·πâko·πá·π≠u policaiy≈´·π≠·π≠ukku nƒÅya·πâƒÅr IrƒÅcƒÅkka·∏∑ nƒÅya·πâƒÅr mutalika·∏∑il mƒÅ·π≠akku·∏∑akki·∏ªi·π≠attu maturaiyil kƒÅma·πâ Araca·πâƒÅ·πâa AtiyamƒÅ·πâtevar pakkal nƒÅ·πÖka·∏∑ Upaiya·πÖko·πá·π≠u IvvƒÅ·πá·π≠ai vaiykƒÅci mƒÅtam Irupattu Iru·πá·π≠ƒÅntiyati mutal cantirƒÅtittavaraikkum nƒÅ·∏∑ O·πâ·πüukku Arici nƒÅ·∏ªiUri IvArici nƒÅ·∏ªiUrikkum I
varpakkalk ko·πá·π≠a pa·πáam 2 10 2 1/2 Ippa·πáam Irupattu Ira·πá·π≠araiyum kaikko·πá·π≠u IvArici nƒÅ·∏ªiUriyum p≈´caippe·πü·πüukkuk kaikko·πá·π≠u I·πâ·πâƒÅ·∏∑ mutal cantirƒÅtittavaraiyum p≈´cikkak ka·π≠avomƒÅkac cammatittu Upaiyatti·π≠·π≠uk ku·π≠uttom Ivva·πâaivarom
Ivai civaruttirapa·πá·π≠itƒÅasya Ivai ·π≠aiyƒÅ·πâ pa·π≠·π≠asya Ippa·π≠ikku Ivai taru·πáentupa·π≠·π≠asya Ippa·π≠ikku Itu ≈õrƒ´mƒÅhe≈õvara rak·π£ai .
Ivai ·π≠aiyƒÅ·πâ. A portion of the inscription is left uncut.
Digital edition of SII 5.481 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
